subject: A green-skinned goblin hunched over a chest or pile of loot, rummaging through items with intent focus
description: A wiry green-skinned goblin with long pointed ears, jutting lower tusks, and a wide gap-toothed mouth leans forward over a stash of belongings, rifling through them with both hands. The figure's posture is greedy and conspiratorial — shoulders raised, eyes fixed on the loot. The palette is warm and rusty: ochre and brown earth tones in the background, with the goblin's mossy green skin standing out as the focal hue. Lighting is low and ambient, suggesting a dim hideout, cellar, or den interior. The composition is a tight mid-shot with the goblin filling most of the frame.
foreground: goblin hunched over loot, rummaging with both hands
background: dim warm-toned interior, indistinct earthen surroundings
emotion: greedy focus, mischievous intent, conspiratorial absorption
